audit_items.proof_trace: The six inline functions in sds.h (sdslen, sdsavail, sdssetlen, sdsinclen, sdsalloc, sdssetalloc) are pure accessors/mutators that contain zero free operations and thus cannot internally exhibit UAF. The sds.c free operations (sdsfree, sdsMakeRoomFor's internal s_free, sdsRemoveFreeSpace) all correctly access memory before freeing and update pointers before returning new allocations. Additionally, s_malloc/s_realloc map to zmalloc/zrealloc which call abort() on OOM (zmalloc.c:89-93), making all NULL-return paths in sds.c dead code at runtime.
